sails.name: google-oauth
sails.description: Google OAuth provider for BetterAuth — adds Google sign-in button

sails.name: stripe
sails.description: Stripe subscriptions with checkout, webhooks, and customer portal

sails.name: r2-storage
sails.description: File uploads via Cloudflare R2 with presigned URLs. Adds profile picture upload.

sails.name: push-notifications
sails.description: Push notifications via Capacitor + Firebase Cloud Messaging with device token management and server-side sending

sails.name: analytics
sails.description: Privacy-friendly analytics with PostHog — auto page views, user identification, and custom event tracking

sails.name: admin-dashboard
sails.description: Admin dashboard for user management, metrics, and basic analytics

sails.name: i18n
sails.description: Multi-language support with i18next, react-i18next, and language detection

sails.name: file-uploads
sails.description: Generic file upload system with R2/S3 storage

sails.name: gdpr
sails.description: Full GDPR compliance: consent tracking, data export, account deletion (30-day grace period), privacy policy page
